why: ground-up rebuild of the test-doctrine governances (suite-format, spec-format, impl-producer, builder-impl) around the owner's two-axis model — suite specifies acceptance (axis 1, decision-graph shape), verification level is impl-detail chosen as-high-as-doesnt-hurt (axis 2); high blast because the new suite bar re-polices every behavioral .feature in the corpus, and any narrowing re-cut to a frozen suite (ssa-lowering #305/#306) fires Clearance; auto-none because every gate is owner-ratified and the corpus sweep needs owner scoping
approach: rebuild suite-format around acceptance-only + decision-graph; move level out
fold axis-2 level-pyramid rule into impl-producer + builder-impl
